CustomField.description: Automated lead qualification based on product type, monthly income, and requested credit line
CustomField.formula:
OR( AND( ISPICKVAL(Product__c, "Visa Plata"), CreditLine__c <= 3000, MonthlyIncome__c <= 3500, MonthlyIncome__c >= 0 ),
AND( ISPICKVAL(Product__c, "Visa Oro"), CreditLine__c <= 5000, MonthlyIncome__c <= 5500, MonthlyIncome__c > 3500 ),
AND( ISPICKVAL(Product__c, "Visa Infinite"), CreditLine__c <= 7000, MonthlyIncome__c >= 7500 ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Indicates if the lead is eligible for the selected card based on income and credit line requirements
CustomField.label: IsEligible
